chart.asterisk-2: ** The grand winner of the tournament gets a ticket to the Aston Martin Drive Day in addition to the prize money. In case the grand winner declines the prize or is for whatever reason unable to go on the trip, the prize is then forfeited in favor of the person next in line of prize distribution.
